author: Shipped
text:
Add per-task target_branch override

A task's optional target_branch overrides the repo-level target_branch and the current-branch fallback for that task's bl review. Smallest unit that expresses git-flow's hotfix-to-main vs feature-to-develop split without a parallel branch-type lifecycle. In deferred mode it becomes the forge PR base.

One new seam: Config::integration_branch_for (task ?? config ?? HEAD), the per-task analogue of integration_branch(). review squash, claim catch-up, show delivery route through it; multi-task scans stay repo-level. Field is optional + skip_serializing_if None, so old task files stay byte-identical and an older bl round-trips it via extra. Validation helpers moved to task_validate.rs; cmd_create args bundled into CreateArgs.
